scripts.dev:frontend-chain: pnpm generate-types && concurrently -n web,mobile -c green,yellow "pnpm web:dev" "pnpm mobile:dev"
scripts.clean: powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter node_modules | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter .turbo | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; if (Test-Path pnpm-lock.yaml) { Remove-Item pnpm-lock.yaml }"
